_source: nfa0 = China net IIP / nominal GDP, end-2025. REAL data: SAFE (State Administration of Foreign Exchange) 'China's International Investment Position as at the End of 2025' — net external assets USD 4,071.3 billion; NBS official 2025 nominal GDP 140.1879 trillion yuan = USD 20.01 trillion (gov.cn, implied CNY/USD 7.006). 4071.3 / 20010 = +20.35% of GDP. Cross-check: BoFiT end-June 2025 implied ~20% of GDP. China is a net creditor. UNIT FACTORS (units.*): GDP_CN is now a REAL chain-linked SA volume index (base 2011Q1=100) and CPI_CN is a price index (100·log space), so nominal output is reconstructed by re-inflating the real index with the price index and calibrating to nominal USD via usdBase (see _unit_factors_note). tradeFreqMult=3 quarterizes the monthly-average USD trade flows. NOT synthetic — usdBase is a pure unit/level calibration against the SAFE/NBS end-2025 anchor.
_flags: iNFA (imputed return on NFA, ~3% p.a.) and fxShare (FX-exposed NFA share, ~0.4) are MODELING DEFAULTS shipped flagged (like the structural SFA), NOT estimated/sourced.
_unit_factors_note: units.* convert the unit-mismatched native level paths to a single common NOMINAL-USD scale so the TB/GDP (and CA, NFA roll-forward) ratio is comparable. With CN re-estimated on a REAL GDP volume index, gdpKind='realIndexDeflate': nominal-USD GDP = exp(GDP_CN/100)·exp(CPI_CN/100)·usdBase — re-inflate the real chain-linked volume index (idx.gdp) by the CPI price index (idx.deflator) to recover nominal output (in index·index units), then scale to nominal USD by usdBase (a level calibration). usdBase=158760958.8679 was calibrated against the end-2025 historical anchor (real-GDP index + CPI at 2025Q4) so the anchor goods-trade balance lands at China's published ~+4.45% of GDP surplus. tradeFreqMult=3 (EXP_CN/IMP_CN are MONTHLY-average USD flows vs a QUARTERLY GDP → ×3 to quarterize). These are pure unit/level conversions, not fabricated data; each native series remains its real sourced value. The previous nominalLocal path (gdpScale=1e6, fxToUsd=6.7686) is RETIRED — it applied to the old nominal-CNY-millions GDP_CN, which no longer exists. externalChartable TRUE — CN renders external charts on the common-USD ratio. See app/src/lib/compute/externalAccounting.ts (ExternalUnitFactors, gdpKind='realIndexDeflate' branch) and app/src/__tests__/compute/externalAccounting.test.ts.
